text.title: Daily Ship Rubric Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Daily Ship Rubric application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Rubric MUST contain exactly 5 binary gates (spec / code / tests / deploy / customer-visible); fewer is incomplete, more dilutes focus.
rule.rationale: 5 gates is the empirically robust solo daily floor.

rule.statement: Each gate MUST be binary pass/fail; no 'partial' or 'in-progress' values.
rule.rationale: Partial values become the default; binary forces decision.

rule.statement: Customer-visible-change gate cannot be skipped; backend-only days count as no-ship.
rule.rationale: Days without customer-visible change drift to busywork.

rule.statement: Rubric MUST be evaluated within 24h of start_at; later evaluation invalidates the day.
rule.rationale: Past 24h, the operator's recall is reconstructive.

rule.statement: Owner field MUST be a named human; 'me' / 'we' / 'team' rejected.
